## Crypto\_2.tryDecryptCollectionFile() function

Attempts to parse and decrypt a JSON object if it's an encrypted collection file.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function tryDecryptCollectionFile(json: JsonObject, key: Uint8Array, cryptoProvider: ICryptoProvider): Promise<Result<JsonObject>>;
```

Promise&lt;Result&lt;JsonObject&gt;&gt;

Success with decrypted JSON content, or Failure with error (including if not encrypted)
